chatgpt_app.description: Resolve the active user's Brain session identity agents should use for durable memory, bias/preferences, and portable agent-memory calls.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_session

chatgpt_app.description: Prepare or store a user-level Brain memory. On the ChatGPT App surface this tool previews by default; save only after explicit user confirmation by passing context.confirmed_by_user=true.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_remember

chatgpt_app.description: Store a stable user-profile fact that should always be returned by brain_session to tailor future answers. On the ChatGPT App surface this requires confirmed_by_user=true.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_profile_context_remember

chatgpt_app.description: List standing user-profile context returned by brain_session.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_profile_context_list

chatgpt_app.description: Remove one standing user-profile context item by id. On the ChatGPT App surface this requires confirmed_by_user=true.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_profile_context_forget

chatgpt_app.description: Return user-visible Brain app data controls: recent app writes, profile context, preprompt items, recent memories, and open loops.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_app_data_controls

chatgpt_app.description: Prepare or store a user-level source such as an article, email, transcript, markdown note, or table. On the ChatGPT App surface this tool previews by default; save only after explicit user confirmation by passing confirmed_by_user=true.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_ingest_source

chatgpt_app.description: Answer a user-level memory query with evidence. Recommendation-style palate queries may use Brain Palate ranking.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_recall

chatgpt_app.description: Build an entity-centric Brain profile.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_profile_entity

chatgpt_app.description: List open questions, ideas, reminders, and parked research threads.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_list_open_loops

chatgpt_app.description: Read one Brain memory card by id.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_get_memory

chatgpt_app.description: Review recent Brain ingestion runs, sources, memories, and conflict links.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_review_recent

chatgpt_app.description: Soft-delete objects created by one recent ingestion run. On the ChatGPT App surface this requires confirmed_by_user=true.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_undo_last

chatgpt_app.description: Bridge the active user's Brain session into their dedicated, removable agent-memory dataset. Use the session_id returned by brain_session.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_agent_memory

chatgpt_app.description: Recall directly from the dedicated Cognee agent-memory dataset.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_agent_memory_recall

chatgpt_app.description: Read-only palate describe/enrich tool. Use this when the user asks to use palate to describe, look up, normalize, or enrich a restaurant, wine, film, series, music, cigar, or other taste item without saving it. For example: 'use palate to describe Junsei restaurant in London'. This must not store palate data.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_palate_describe_item

chatgpt_app.description: Rank already-saved canonical palate records for a recommendation or comparison query. Do not use this to describe, look up, enrich, or check a single named unsaved item such as Junsei; call brain_palate_describe_item for that.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_palate_query

chatgpt_app.description: Rank only supplied options against already-saved canonical palate records. Do not use this to describe, look up, enrich, or check one named item; call brain_palate_describe_item for read-only item descriptions.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_palate_evaluate_options

chatgpt_app.description: Confirm a pending palate proposal by proposal_id.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_palate_confirm

chatgpt_app.description: Cancel a pending palate proposal by proposal_id.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_palate_cancel

chatgpt_app.description: Apply a free-text correction to a pending palate proposal.
chatgpt_app.name: brain_palate_correct_proposal

internal_admin.description: Resolve the active user's Brain session identity agents should use for durable memory, bias/preferences, and portable agent-memory calls.
internal_admin.name: brain_session

internal_admin.description: Render the Brain review and data-controls panel in ChatGPT. This opens the app UI and does not directly read or change memory data.
internal_admin.name: brain_app_open_review_panel

internal_admin.description: Store a user-level memory, fact, thought, or short note in Brain. High-confidence palate memories may route to Brain Palate automatically. Do not use this for read-only palate describe/enrich requests; use brain_palate_describe_item instead.
internal_admin.name: brain_remember

internal_admin.description: Store a stable user-profile fact that should always be returned by brain_session to tailor future answers. On the ChatGPT App surface this requires confirmed_by_user=true.
internal_admin.name: brain_profile_context_remember

internal_admin.description: List standing user-profile context returned by brain_session.
internal_admin.name: brain_profile_context_list

internal_admin.description: Remove one standing user-profile context item by id. On the ChatGPT App surface this requires confirmed_by_user=true.
internal_admin.name: brain_profile_context_forget

internal_admin.description: Return user-visible Brain app data controls: recent app writes, profile context, preprompt items, recent memories, and open loops.
internal_admin.name: brain_app_data_controls

internal_admin.description: Project all standing profile-context items into the normal Brain memory/entity graph linked to the configured owner entity.
internal_admin.name: brain_profile_context_sync

internal_admin.description: Store source material and optionally extract durable Brain memories. Brain may detect palate mentions, but large source ingestion avoids mass palate enrichment/writes without confirmation.
internal_admin.name: brain_ingest_source

internal_admin.description: Answer a user-level memory query with evidence. Recommendation-style palate queries may use Brain Palate ranking.
internal_admin.name: brain_recall

internal_admin.description: Build an entity-centric Brain profile.
internal_admin.name: brain_profile_entity

internal_admin.description: List open questions, ideas, reminders, and parked research threads.
internal_admin.name: brain_list_open_loops

internal_admin.description: Read one Brain memory card by id.
internal_admin.name: brain_get_memory

internal_admin.description: Read Brain source metadata and optionally truncated source text.
internal_admin.name: brain_get_source

internal_admin.description: Resolve a contradiction or duplicate between two Brain memories.
internal_admin.name: brain_resolve_conflict

internal_admin.description: Soft delete a Brain object. Hard delete requires confirm=true.
internal_admin.name: brain_forget

internal_admin.description: Review recent Brain ingestion runs, sources, memories, and conflict links.
internal_admin.name: brain_review_recent

internal_admin.description: Soft-delete objects created by one recent ingestion run. On the ChatGPT App surface this requires confirmed_by_user=true.
internal_admin.name: brain_undo_last

internal_admin.description: Manually sync pending Brain projections to Cognee.
internal_admin.name: brain_sync_cognee

internal_admin.description: Mark Cognee projections stale so they can be rebuilt from Brain DB.
internal_admin.name: brain_rebuild_cognee

internal_admin.description: Run Cognee native improve on a configured dataset, optionally bridging session feedback.
internal_admin.name: cognee_improve

internal_admin.description: Bridge the active user's Brain session into their dedicated, removable agent-memory dataset. Use the session_id returned by brain_session.
internal_admin.name: brain_agent_memory

internal_admin.description: Recall directly from the dedicated Cognee agent-memory dataset.
internal_admin.name: brain_agent_memory_recall

internal_admin.description: Clear the dedicated Cognee agent-memory dataset after explicit confirmation.
internal_admin.name: brain_agent_memory_clear

internal_admin.description: Merge a duplicate entity into a primary entity after confirmation.
internal_admin.name: brain_merge_entities

internal_admin.description: Read-only palate describe/enrich tool. Use this when the user asks to use palate to describe, look up, normalize, or enrich a restaurant, wine, film, series, music, cigar, or other taste item without saving it. For example: 'use palate to describe Junsei restaurant in London'. This must not store palate data.
internal_admin.name: brain_palate_describe_item

internal_admin.description: Store an approved normalized palate item in the canonical palate store and project Brain evidence.
internal_admin.name: brain_palate_remember

internal_admin.description: Rank already-saved canonical palate records for a recommendation or comparison query. Do not use this to describe, look up, enrich, or check a single named unsaved item such as Junsei; call brain_palate_describe_item for that.
internal_admin.name: brain_palate_query

internal_admin.description: Rank only supplied options against already-saved canonical palate records. Do not use this to describe, look up, enrich, or check one named item; call brain_palate_describe_item for read-only item descriptions.
internal_admin.name: brain_palate_evaluate_options

internal_admin.description: Record which palate item was chosen after a recommendation.
internal_admin.name: brain_palate_log_decision

internal_admin.description: Confirm a pending palate proposal by proposal_id.
internal_admin.name: brain_palate_confirm

internal_admin.description: Cancel a pending palate proposal by proposal_id.
internal_admin.name: brain_palate_cancel

internal_admin.description: Apply a free-text correction to a pending palate proposal.
internal_admin.name: brain_palate_correct_proposal

internal_admin.description: Refresh enrichment for one canonical palate item.
internal_admin.name: brain_palate_refresh_enrichment
